task: Capture codex usage from the forked ACP adapter and support adapter command overrides. Background: codex never fills PromptResponse.Usage over ACP, so codex attempts record captured=false; our fork of the codex adapter (heurema/codex-acp) now forwards the full billing breakdown in usage_update notifications under the _meta key codex/token_usage, carrying the codex TokenUsageInfo shape: {total_token_usage, last_token_usage, model_context_window} where each token usage holds input_tokens, cached_input_tokens, output_tokens, reasoning_output_tokens, total_tokens (cumulative session totals in total_token_usage — the right per-attempt figures since one ACP session is one attempt). Two parts. (1) Adapter command override: the ACP adapter launch is hardcoded to npx -y <package>@latest; add per-engine environment overrides PACTUM_CLAUDE_ACP_COMMAND and PACTUM_CODEX_ACP_COMMAND whose value is an executable path that replaces only the npx+package invocation — pactum still appends the same computed arguments (codex -c sandbox/model pins) and environment (claude model/effort env) it appends today; document the override in docs/agents.md including the supply-chain angle (SECURITY.md already advises pinning/controlling external ACP tooling; the override is how). (2) Usage from usage_update meta: in the ACP client's SessionUpdate, when a usage_update notification carries _meta key codex/token_usage, parse the TokenUsageInfo JSON and retain the latest seen total_token_usage as the attempt's usage (notifications repeat per turn with cumulative totals — last one wins); on attempt finalize, the existing prompt-response usage (resp.Usage, the claude path) takes precedence when present, the meta-derived usage is the fallback, and neither present keeps today's captured=false with the existing warning. Normalize to the same conventions as the existing tokenUsage(): InputTokens stays provider-inclusive of cached reads (codex input_tokens already includes cached_input_tokens), CacheReadTokens = cached_input_tokens, CacheCreationTokens = 0 (OpenAI cache writes are free and unreported), OutputTokens includes reasoning, ReasoningTokens = reasoning_output_tokens, TotalTokens = total_tokens, Captured = true. Malformed or missing meta is ignored without failing the attempt (a warning at most). Tests: a scripted ACP session emitting usage_update with the meta shape yields a captured TokenUsage with the exact mapped fields; repeated notifications keep the last cumulative totals; prompt-response usage wins over meta when both exist; absent/malformed meta preserves captured=false plus warning; adapter override env vars change only the command while arguments and environment stay byte-identical (both engines). Docs: agents.md (override + codex usage note), cost-budget-design.md notes codex usage now flows via the forked adapter until the change is upstreamed.
